LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE ACTION IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S ADMISSION THAT HER TIME COMMITMENT HAD INCREASED BEYOND HER EXPECTATIONS MORE THAN A YEAR BEFORE FILING SUIT, IN ANY EVENT PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACTS AS TO FALSITY AS TO A REPRESENTATION OF FACT OR THAT DEFENDANT KNEW ANY SUCH REPRESENTATION WAS FALSE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, COURT REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer J. Walt, Esq., Littler Mendelson, P.C., 415-677-3137; for defendant and moving party
Michael P. Guta, Esq., Law Offices of John E. Hill, 510-588-1000, for plaintiff and opposing party

MATTER WAS ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS
GRANTED. The action is barred by the statute of limitations in light of plaintiff's admission that her time commitment had increased beyond her expectations more than a year before filing suit, in any event Plaintiff has raised a triable issue of material facts as to falsity as to a representation of fact or that defendant knew any such representation was false. Prevailing party to submit a form of order in compliance with CCP 437C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Set For Trial On Aug-01-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-18-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606

Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Sivan Holtzman, Or, Alt To Dismiss Pltf Holtzman W/Prejudice; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Sivan Holtzman, Or, Alternatively To Dismiss Plaintiff Sivan Holtzman With Prejudice And Request For Sanctions is Granted, Plaintiff Holtzman must present herself for deposition in San Francisco in accordance with the depostion notice no later than March 31, 2011 and must pay Defendant sanctions in the amount of $1,315.00 by that date. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =(301/PJB)
